final:
module RefModule (
    input wire J,
    input wire K,
    input wire clk,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        case ({J, K})
            2'b00: Q <= Q;         // No change
            2'b01: Q <= 0;         // Reset
            2'b10: Q <= 1;         // Set
            2'b11: Q <= ~Q;        // Toggle
        endcase
    end
endmodule
